bead.title: Harden the required GitHub test workflow
bead.description:
The repo has .github/workflows/test.yml, but heimq needs an explicit required CI workflow suitable for branch protection. Make the test workflow clearly named `test`, triggered on pull_request, push to main, and workflow_dispatch. It should run on ubuntu-latest, use Rust stable or the repository-pinned toolchain if one exists, cache Cargo/build artifacts, and run formatting, clippy, and workspace tests for all heimq workspace crates. Preserve existing specialized workflows (parity, ecosystem, benchmark, postgres) rather than folding them into this job.

In-scope files:
- .github/workflows/test.yml
- crates/heimq/docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-002-bead-close-test-gate.md only if the documented gate needs a small update

Out-of-scope:
- Docker image publication.
- Release binary artifacts.
- Helm chart work.
- Changing Rust source code except to fix CI-only lint fallout explicitly caused by the workflow.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
2. `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes, or the workflow documents and justifies any existing warning exceptions without hiding new warnings.
3. `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes.
4. `.github/workflows/test.yml` contains pull_request, push, and workflow_dispatch triggers and a job named `test`.
